issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing TCs and HAs to receive duplicate tasks in the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually review and dismiss duplicate tasks for any LS leads that fell in the impact window; re-enroll affected leads manually if needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continued firing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were not being unenrolled from the post-referral workflow, causing HAs to continue receiving weekly check-in tasks after a deal was no longer active. A filter tweak was applied to correct the exit criteria. Both Closed Lost and Transferred statuses were affected.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with previous loan officer's information after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was identified on a specific deal where LO Paul's details persisted despite being updated to Julie Yocum. The fix was confirmed by Luis.
issues.workaround: Manually send any automated emails that went out with incorrect LO information and resend with the correct LO details.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. This was updated to allow re-enrollment.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving tasks and closing info collection being missed. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed a fix was applied. The absence of a lender assignment was suspected but not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected MRC deals into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually for any deals that fell in the impact window.
